name: Gold
description: Premium membership for organizations seeking maximum visibility, exclusive networking opportunities, priority event access, and enhanced business promotion.

name: Silver
description: Ideal for growing businesses looking to expand their network, participate in chamber events, and access valuable member resources and marketing opportunities.

name: Bronze
description: A great entry-level option for businesses wanting to connect with the local business community, attend chamber events, and enjoy core member benefits.

name: NP (Non-profit)
description: Complimentary membership for registered non-profit organizations, providing access to networking opportunities, community partnerships, and chamber resources at no cost.
